About Me

Two worlds.
One vision.

I am a creative designer with a strong foundation in civil engineering. My engineering background gives me a unique eye for structure, precision, and problem-solving — while my design skills allow me to craft visually compelling digital experiences.

I help brands communicate clearly through graphic design and build intuitive, modern websites. As a fresh KIHBT graduate with hands-on KeRRA site experience, I bring both technical discipline and fresh creative perspectives.

Whether it's a logo, a landing page, or a structural visualization — I approach every project with the same rigor: purposeful, precise, and polished.

"Passionate about merging logic with art — from blueprints to pixels."
Background

Education & Experience

Work Experience

KeRRA — Kenya Rural Roads Authority
Industrial Attachment — Site Engineer
May–Aug 2025

Worked on the Upgrading to Bitumen Standard Project (Contract No. RWC 594) under Resident Engineer Eng. A. Irungu. Received a commendation for being self-motivated, disciplined, punctual, and hardworking.

Road Surveying Materials Testing CBR & Field Density Asphalt Inspection Site Diaries Concrete Works

Education

Kenya Institute of Highways & Building Technology (KIHBT)
Diploma in Civil Engineering
Expected: March 2026  ·  Module 3 completed — awaiting results
Structural Design Engineering Surveying Construction Management Materials Testing Estimating & Tendering
Moi Uloma Secondary School

2022  ·  Grade B
What I Do

Services & Skills

🎨
Graphic Design

Visual communication crafted with purpose — from brand identity to print-ready materials.

  • Logo & brand identity design
  • Social media visuals & templates
  • Print materials (brochures, flyers)
  • Posters & marketing collateral
💻
Web Design

Modern, responsive websites built with clean code — intuitive layouts that convert visitors.

  • UI/UX design & wireframing
  • Responsive front-end development
  • Landing pages & portfolios
  • WordPress customization
📐
Engineering Design

Technical precision applied to visualization — AutoCAD drafting & site documentation.

  • AutoCAD drafting & layouts
  • Road & structural visualization
  • Site plans & cross-sections
  • Technical site documentation
